caption:
📢 MMU Swimming club’s Committee Recruitment is now open!

We are looking for passionate and dedicated committees to help liven things up in our swimming club, whether it’s for competitions, events, or weekly classes 🏊‍♂️

 Divisions needed:
• Coaching 
• Events
• Publicity

Think you have what it takes? Give it a shot!

Down the rabbit hole we go!

Welcome to CSRW (Club & Society Registration Week)! 🐇♣️

Whether you’re a beginner or a professional swimmer, there’s always a place for you in our crew.
♠️ Come meet us, have some fun, and welcome aboard the adventure!♦️

📍 CLC Complex, Booth CLC-3
⏰ 9AM – 5PM

Scan the QR and jump down the rabbit hole with us! 🫖🐰

The MMU Swimming Team had competed in the recently held Varsity Swimming Competition (Circuit-1) held in Relau Sports Complex, Penang on the 18th and 19th April. Our swimmers successfully clinched 6 medals by the end of the competition. 

The results are as follows:
🥇50m Backstroke (Women’s) - @christytxt_
🥈50m Breaststroke (Women’s) - @christytxt_
🥈100m Backstroke (Women’s) - @christytxt_
🥉200m Individual Medley (Men) - @ilje0411
🥉400m Individual Medley (Men) - @ilje0411
🥉4x100 Mixed Freestyle Relay - @christytxt_ @a.aiden12
@z.zzaun @borneel_c

Congratulations to them and we wish them best of luck for their future endeavours.

#sukanipt #varsityswimming #mmuswimmingclub #mmumalaysia

Movie Night Recap🎬

Thank you to everyone who joined us for our lively movie night on 28 January 2026! 

We hope you enjoyed the fun and welcoming atmosphere- sharing laughs, bonding over a great film, and maybe even making a few new friends along the way.
MMU Swimming Club wishes you a wonderful holiday, and we can’t wait to see you back at the pool next semester! 🏊‍♂️

#movienight
#mmuswimmingclub 
#spidermanintothespiderverse

MMU Swimming Club is happy to announce that our Lifesaving 101: LSSM Bronze Medallion Certification is open for registration! This is your chance to learn essential lifesaving skills that will earn you a recognized certification 🏊‍♂️🛟

This course includes 4 professional training sessions (6 weeks) and 1 Certification test, conducted by a certified coach.
Whether you’re aiming for lifeguard qualification, water safety skills, or just to level up your swimming, this programme is for you!

Outside, this certification usually costs RM650 to RM1000 —
At MMU, you’re getting it for as low as RM260!
(The cheapest you’ll find in the market!)

⸻

🛟 Pre-requisites:
	•	Able to swim 100m continuously
	•	Able to swim 300m (any stroke)
	•	Able to dive and retrieve an object from a depth of 2m
✅ A pre-requisite test will be conducted on 28 April 2026

⸻

📍 Venue:
MMU Swimming Pool

🕒 Training Sessions:
During MMU Swimming Club members’ swimming sessions.

⸻

🗓️ Last Date to Register:
28 April 2026

💰 Fees:
	•	RM260 (MMU Swimming Club Members)
	•	RM300 (Non-Members)

(Compared to outside — this is a steal!)

Interested? Register now!

📽️ RECAP: Annual Grand Meeting (AGM) Term 25/26 🌊

What a day! The MMU Swimming Club Annual Grand Meeting Term 25/26 was a resounding success!

Thank you to every member who showed up to contribute, debate, and elect the future leaders of our club. The energy in the hall was absolutely electric! ⚡

Scan and Join the MMU Swimming Club community! 🌊🤝
• Sign up as a member 📝
• Apply for committee positions 📌
• Meet new people 👥
• Get updates on training, events & activities 📣

Be part of a family that grows together — join the community today! 💙

Boarding soon with MMU Swimming Club ✈️🌊
• Dates: 18–20 November 2025
• Time: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
• Location: CLC-9, CLC Complex

Grab your boarding pass at our booth — member sign-ups, committee roles & all club info available!
Join the fam and make waves with us 🤍🏊‍♂️

Ending the year with festive vibes 🎄✨, swimming goals 🏊‍♂️🎯, and a wishlist full of goggles 🤿, kickboards 🏄‍♂️, and better strokes 💪💦
Here’s to more splashes, laughs 😄, and safe swimming in the year ahead 🌊

Merry Christmas 🎄 and Happy New Year 2026 🎆

—MMU Swimming Club 💙

Happy New Year, Swimmers! 🎆🏊‍♂️

Kick off 2026 with a splash (and some snacks)! Our very first MMU Swimming Club bonding session is officially here. Join us for a cinematic journey through the Spider-Verse.

The Details:
• 📅 Date: 28th Jan, 2026
• ⏰ Time: 8:00 PM – 10:00 PM
• 📍 Venue: CQMX0001, FCI Theatre 
Entry Details:
• Members: FREE! (A perk of the family)
• Non-Members: Only RM 3.
• Pro Tip: Join the club and your movie night is FREE!

Ready to join us? Scan the QR

Don’t miss out on the snacks, the movie, and the chance to meet your fellow swimmers. See you there! 🕷️✨

Calling All Volunteers!

MMU Swimming Gala 2025 is looking for Time Taker Volunteers!
Date: 24 May 2025 (Saturday)
Time: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Venue: MMU Swimming Pool Complex

Join the splash and help make the event run smoothly!

Role: Time Taker Volunteer
Job Scope:
	•	Record swimmers’ start and finish times
	•	Use stopwatch or timing sheets (all equipment provided)
	•	Ensure accurate and fair timing
	•	Coordinate with officials and event crew

Benefits:
	•	Free food & refreshments
	•	Certificate of participation
 •  Free decathlon vouchers
	•	Fun and rewarding experience

Register now and be part of this exciting event!

Enquiries?
☎️ Xinyi (President) – +60 12‑426 0866

MMU Swimming Club wishes you a wonderful holiday, and we can’t wait to see you back at the pool next semester! 🏊‍♂️

CLOSED

🏊‍♂️ MMU at Varsity Swimming Championship 2025 🏅
Held at TAR UMT, MMU proudly sent 4 swimmers —
2 from Cyberjaya Campus and 2 from Melaka Campus — to compete on the national stage!

Our team gave it their all and brought home:
🥇 1 Gold
🥈 3 Silvers
🥉 1 Bronze

✨ Event Highlights:
🥇 100m Backstroke – Gold by @christyteh11
🥉 50m Backstroke – Bronze by @christyteh11
🥈 200m Freestyle – Silver by @anselmm_
🥈 400m Freestyle – Silver by @christyteh11
🥈 1500m Freestyle – Silver by @anselmm_

👥 MMU Swimmers:
@yithung_12 | @anselmm_ | @christyteh11 | @a.aiden12

A huge thank you to @tarumtswimmingclub and @tarumt.official for hosting an incredible event! 💙

Proudly collaborating with @mmu_swimming_club 🤝🏊‍♂️

📸 Recap | Varsity Swimming Championship 2025 🏊‍♀️🔥
A weekend full of speed, spirit, and sportsmanship at TAR UMT! From thrilling races to proud podium moments, our MMU swimmers gave it their all.

Dive in, Sharks! New to MMU or making a comeback, register as a member in minutes by scanning the QR . All levels welcome.  Find us at CSRW, Booth 24, Section D from 18–20 Aug, 8am–6pm. See you by the pool.

Dear MMU Students,

The MMU Swimming Club is excited to announce the registration for *Life Saving 101: LSSM Bronze Medallion Certification* — your chance to learn essential lifesaving skills and earn a recognized certification!

This course includes 4 professional training sessions and 1 *certification* test, conducted by a certified coach.
Whether you’re aiming for lifeguard qualification, water safety skills, or just to level up your swimming, this programme is for you!

Outside, this certification usually costs RM650 to RM1000 —
At MMU, you’re getting it for as low as RM260!
(The *CHEAPEST* you’ll find in the market!)

⸻

🛟 Pre-requisites:
	•	Able to swim 100m continuously
	•	Able to swim 300m (any stroke)
	•	Able to dive and retrieve an object from a depth of 20m
✅ A pre-requisite test will be conducted on 28 April 2025, from 8:00 PM to 10:00 PM.

⸻

📍 Venue:
MMU Swimming Pool

📅 Programme Period:
March/April 2025 Trimester (Official dates to be announced)

🕒 Training Sessions:
During MMU Swimming Club members’ swimming sessions.

⸻

🗓️ Last Date to Register:
28 April 2025

💰 Fees:
	•	RM260 (MMU Swimming Club Members)
	•	RM350 (Non-Members)

(Compared to outside — this is a steal!)

⸻

For inquiries, contact:
Ahmad Daniel Ikhwan Bin Rosli
Vice-President, MMU Swimming Club
📞 +60 11-6565 6758

Register now:
https://forms.office.com/r/z6CGfTKx0r

🌟 MMU Swimming Club Needs YOU!

Dive into a leadership role and help steer the club to success! We’re recruiting for:

🦖  Secretary
🦖  Treasurer
🦖  Logistics
🦖  Publicity
🦖  Coaching
🦖  Events

No experience? No worries—passion is all you need!

📩 Apply now: scan the QR code.

Dive with us! 🌊

🏊‍♂️ Hello MMU Swimming Club Members! 🌊

We’re excited to announce our first members’ session of the trimester, happening right after CSR Week!

🔔 Heads up:
At the end of the session, we’ll be hosting a voluntary time trial to assess swimmer performance.
Feeling a little competitive? 😏 Dive in! We’ll be using the results to consider swimmers for future events or competitions — so stay tuned!

See you there!

PUBLICITY DIVISION – Term 2025/2026
Head of Publicity: Haziq
Team: Jason, Lina

EXECUTIVE – Term 2025/2026
President: Xinyi
Vice President: Daniel

MMU Swimming Club proudly made its first successful attempt at hosting the AGM directly at the swimming pool, bringing an exciting close to 2024 and diving into 2025 with open arms! 🌊✨ A huge thank you to all our members for making this day unforgettable. 🙌

We apologise for any mishaps or inconvenience that may have occurred during the event. Rest assured, we will reflect and improve to make the next event even better. We look forward to seeing you all at future events and an even more exciting AGM 2025! 🚀

MMU Swimming Club has fully transitioned to virtual membership cards, leaving the plastic cards behind! 🎟️ 

For 2025, all club members will be fully utilizing virtual cards for future events and weekly sessions. 

Grab yours during our weekly member session! Important announcements will be shared in the WhatsApp group. Thank you.
